inputs.user_input: Draft and send an email to all students reminding them that the Software Testing quiz covering Unit Testing and Black Box Testing is next Monday at 9am. Include what topics to study and how to prepare.

output:
✓ Email approved and sent to students.

SUBJECT: Reminder: Software Testing Quiz - Unit Testing & Black Box Testing

BODY:
Dear Students,

This email serves as an important reminder regarding the upcoming quiz for the Software Testing course.

The quiz is scheduled for **next Monday at 9:00 AM**.

The quiz will cover topics related to **Unit Testing** and **Black Box Testing**. Specifically for Black Box Testing, please ensure you are familiar with its focus on evaluating software based on its **input, output, and the principle function of a software module**.

To prepare effectively, we recommend reviewing your lecture notes, course materials, and any practical examples discussed in class pertaining to both Unit Testing methodologies and Black Box Testing principles. A strong understanding of the core concepts, techniques, and application scenarios for these testing types will be beneficial.

Should you have any urgent questions regarding the scope of the quiz, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Sincerely,

[Lecturer's Name]
[Lecturer's Title]
Mae Fah Luang University
